name: meok-dpia-edpb-template-mcp
summary: DPIA generator for the EDPB harmonised template (adopted 14 Apr 2026) with EU AI Act Article 26(9) FRIA mapping baked in. 6-question wizard → full DPIA in EDPB 9-section structure with auto-detected risk patterns + residual-risk verdict + Art 36 supervisor-consultation flag. Free 1/day, £29 one-off signed pack, Pro £79/mo unlimited. By MEOK AI Labs.
